programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Those living off the grid must use the warmth and open waterways to harness vital resources, hunt for waterfowl, gather a spring delicacy for an indigenous tradition and harvest animals from a canoe.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: The Alaskans use daylight to secure needed resources and repair vital equipment before the freeze; they embark on an annual fish harvest and see an attempt to lessen dependence on fossil fuels.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Alaskans maximize the 22 hours of sunlight each day to prepare their homesteads, fix equipment, protect their surrounding ecosystem and secure resources for the coming winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: During summer in Alaska, the inhabitants convert an outdated snow system into a useful water reserve, beachcomb the coastline to discover ancient relics and build a new dock on the river.

programme.title: LUCUNYA TUH DISINI 23
programme.desc: Sekar (Janna LIDA) is disappointed with his father, like it or not, he has to help his mother earn a living to meet his daily needs. Sekar faced trials after trials with patience, until finally Sekar and his mother tried to raise honey for their survival.

programme.title: Mak Comblang Cantiknya Terlalu Ke Selatan
programme.desc: Rere (Nabila Zavira) and Farhan (Kenny Austin) are matchmaking agents whose job is to find partners for many people. Farhan has often succeeded in his duties. Meanwhile, Rere has not succeeded at all. Their competition is very tight. Until one night, Rere finally tries to steal a book owned by Farhan and Rere succeeds in stealing and exchanging Farhan's book with another.

programme.title: Satu Pancingan 2 Jodoh Baperan
programme.desc: Citra (Nabila Zavira) works as an infotainment journalist, and Jio (Aliando Syarief) is a famous actor. Jio sees his girlfriend cheating and wants to end her life. However, Citra, seeing Jio's suicidal thoughts, comforts him. Citra eventually collaborates with Jio for an exclusive report.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Ampun King! Kopi Pahit Tapi Mbanya Manis
programme.desc: Wulan was matched with Bagas. Bagas, meeting Wulan for the first time, immediately picked her up at the bus station. Because Bagas didn't know who Wulan was, he ended up searching for her. When they arrived at the bus station, Wulan, alone, was chased by thugs. Not knowing where to go, Wulan ended up getting into Bagas's car.

programme.title: The Killer Among Us
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Anna Cardwell is found shot to death in her rural Alabama home, her close circle of friends mourn in disbelief. But soon speculation begins to swirl that one of their own is not who they seem.

Following the devastating fire at the Nash home, Bobby's fate remains uncertain; Athena embarks on a mission to uncover the truth; Hen and Karin engage in a heated custody battle; Christopher grapples with forgiving Eddie.
A trailer with millions of bees crashes on the streets of Los Angeles, unleashing a swarm.
Athena is tasked with safely delivering a prisoner to testify on a high-profile case; a light plane is hit by a swarm of bees and careens into a passenger plane.
Athena's only chance of surviving and saving everyone on the flight is to attempt to land the plane before it crashes and call on the 118 for help.
When it finally looks like Hen and Karen may get their foster license back, they are hit with another obstacle; the 118 races to the aid of a cheerleader involved in an infield collision.
The 118 is once again working on the spookiest night of the year and missing out on all the tricks and treats; Buck's Halloween decorations become a little scarier than he had hoped.

When a toddler falls down a pipe and becomes trapped, the 118 must rely on more than their skills to rescue him; old wounds are opened when members of the 118 race to the aid of a man dealing with a divorce.
When Athena is assigned a rookie to mentor, she begins to question her own abilities.
Things get messy for the 118 following a massive pipe explosion; Athena investigates the brutal beating of a man found behind a grocery store.
The 118 responds to a fire at a local animal shelter and races to evacuate all the animals; Maddie takes a 9-1-1 call that sets her on a quest for answers.
Following Maddie's mysterious 911 call, Chimney returns home to find his daughter alone and Maddie nowhere to be found.
The 118 responds to a call at a megachurch, where Bobby runs into his estranged mother; Buck is looking to expand his social circle now that Eddie has left.
Maddie's return to work proves to be more triggering than expected, as she may have returned too soon; Eddie struggles to adapt to his new surroundings.
After the 118 responds to several calls from the same person, Hen steps in to offer them advice; Eddie confronts his parents and takes a big step in his relationship with his son.
The 118 is called to a research lab that has been set on fire and becomes a biohazard.
Athena and Buck are in a race against time to rescue the rest of the 118 following the fire in the biolab.
Following the tragic events at the lab, the 118 must come together to lay their fallen hero to rest; despite her own grief, Athena re-investigates the death of a child to help a grieving mother.
Following an earthquake, the 118 races to the scene of several unusual fires and must figure out their cause before anyone else is hurt.
The 118, still reeling from their recent loss, is dispatched to a mass casualty event after a high-rise apartment building collapses; Athena and Chimney have to work together to save a familiar face.

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1

programme.desc: Western Australia's Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its' ancient landscapes andbrilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back tothe earth's beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in NewSouth Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. programme.title: Don't Drive Here

The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 44
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 1

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 11
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v United 13/14
programme.desc: United Archives 29/3/14. The Reds were desperate to bounce back from derby disappointment when they took on Aston Villa at Old Trafford.

programme.title: 2008 UCL FInal: v Chelsea
programme.desc: 50 years after Munich, 40 years on from Wembley and 9 years after Barcelona, United take on Chelsea bidding to rule Europe for the third time.

programme.title: 1999 UCL Final v Bayern Munich
programme.desc: United Archives 26/5/99. An absolute classic, with two trophies in the bag only Bayern Munich stood between United and an unprecedented treble.

programme.title: PL: United v Liverpool 06/07
programme.desc: United Archives 22/10/06. Paul Scholes and Rio Ferdinand are both on the score sheet as United see off Rafa's Liverpool at Old Trafford.

programme.title: PL: Man City v United 12/13
programme.desc: United Archives 9/12/12. Relive this unforgettable Manchester derby as United travelled to the Etihad Stadium knowing victory would leave Sir Alex Ferguson's side in pole position in the title race.

programme.title: FAC: Wimbledon v United 93/94
programme.desc: United Archives 20/2/94. United make light work of Wimbledon in this fifth round FA Cup tie.

programme.title: FAC: v Oldham 93/94 SF Replay
programme.desc: United Archives 8/4/90. United take on Joe Royle's Oldham at Maine Road after a last minute Mark Hughes goal secured a replay three days prior at Wembley.

programme.title: FAC: United v Arsenal 07/08
programme.desc: United Archives 16/2/08. Sir Alex's 100th FA Cup game in charge of United saw them take on Arsenal, one of the oldest and fiercest foes.

programme.title: PL: United v Tottenham 08/09
programme.desc: United Archives 25/4/09. United took on Tottenham knowing that victory was a must, with Liverpool desperate for the Reds to slip up.

programme.desc: A interesting traveling documentary mixed with vlog style hosted by a backpacker who will traveling to visit all the beautiful places in Indonesia.

programme.title: Ikhtiar Terakhir Nenek Penjual Manggis
programme.desc: Jangan lepaskan peluang menonton telemovie terbaik Indonesia hari ini

programme.title: Music Video 2026 Ep451
programme.desc: Dengarkan lagu-lagu hits dari bumi Indonesia yang menarik dan sesuai untuk tontonan seisi keluarga..

programme.title: Music Video 2026 Ep452
programme.desc: Dengarkan lagu-lagu hits dari bumi Indonesia yang menarik dan sesuai untuk tontonan seisi keluarga..

programme.title: Music Video 2026 Ep453
programme.desc: Dengarkan lagu-lagu hits dari bumi Indonesia yang menarik dan sesuai untuk tontonan seisi keluarga..

programme.title: Jatim Traveler Ep07
programme.desc: Jatim Traveler is an exciting journey exploring the culinary riches, tourist destinations and unique traditions in various corners of East Java.

programme.title: Gaspol Ep158
programme.desc: A game show program hosted by Raffi Ahmad with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah.

programme.title: Age Kareba Makassar Ep03
programme.desc: An exciting journey exploring the culinary riches, tourist destinations and unique traditions in various corners of Makassar, Indonesia's port city.

programme.title: The Making of The Furious
programme.desc: Apabila YouTuber Danial menghina nama arwah bapa mereka, Firdaus dan Hakim bersatu semula. Seorang mencari penebusan, seorang lagi menuntut balas dendam dalam pertempuran yang menentukan nasib legasi The Furious.

programme.title: Aku, Mawar & Makhluk Asing
programme.desc: Apabila tunang yang garang tiba-tiba berubah menjadi seorang wanita yang lemah lembut, maka Bart jatuh cinta kembali pada tunangnya, Mawar. Tapi, adakah itu Mawar yang sebenar?

programme.title: Untuk Terakhir Kali
programme.desc: Kisah cinta yang tragis ini mengisahkan tentang Aisyah dan Haris yang menikmati saat-saat akhir cinta mereka pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan mereka yang pertama. Lakonan Elfira Loy dan Baim Wong.

programme.title: You Mean The World To Me
programme.desc: unny, pembuat filem pulang ke kampungnya untuk membuat filem mengenai keluarganya. Berdepan masalah kewangan, dia bersemuka dengan kebenaran tentang keluarganya dan belajar menerima peristiwa lampau.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible (OD FREE_PARAMOUNT)
programme.desc: An American agent, under false suspicion of disloyalty, must discover and expose the real spy without the help of his organization.

programme.title: Walid Ep03
programme.desc: Walid semakin selesa di perlindungan baharu, namun tegang dengan Habiburrahman dalam perebutan kuasa. Di Jihad Ummah, Ummi berhati-hati mengukuh kedudukan—satu silap boleh menjatuhkan segalanya.

programme.title: Kampung Latah Kena Kuarantin
programme.desc: Ajin adalah pekerja di syarikat pelancongan di Kampung Latah Permai. Gelagatnya menghiburkan penduduk kampung dan pelancong. Satu hari, kampung itu dilanda sindrom 'melatah' dan menjadi tidak terkawal.

programme.title: Sepi
programme.desc: Filem drama romantik ini mengisahkan tiga orang insan yang hidup berasingan namun sama-sama mengenal erti cinta, kehilangan dan kesepian. Lakonan Afdlin Shauki, Vanida Imran dan Nasha Aziz.

programme.title: Chikaro
programme.desc: Seorang gadis kampung yang naif menjadi lebih matang dengan pertolongan seorang bekas 'Mat Rempit.' Lakonan Izzue Islam.

programme.title: The Making of The Furious
programme.desc: Apabila YouTuber Danial menghina nama arwah bapa mereka, Firdaus dan Hakim bersatu semula. Seorang mencari penebusan, seorang lagi menuntut balas dendam dalam pertempuran yang menentukan nasib legasi The Furious.

programme.title: Walid Ep01
programme.desc: Ditahan kerana ajaran sesat, Walid meloloskan diri dari serang hendap ganas. Saat pengikut ditangkap dan disoal, kesetiaan retak—dan pelindung misteri muncul dari bayang.

programme.title: Walid Ep02
programme.desc: Walid terjerat pakatan dengan Habiburrahman yang berkarisma. Saat cita-cita memuncak di pergunungan, Ummi bangkit menuntut semula Jihad Ummah—walau terpaksa menjadi apa yang dulu ditentangnya.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih - Trailer
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Adelia, seorang wanita berkerjaya yang kehilangan suami secara mengejut, lalu berusaha sembuh bersama anaknya dan sahabat baik arwah, menemui makna cinta dan peluang kedua dalam hidup hari ini.

programme.title: Walid - Trailer
programme.desc: Walid, tokoh berpengaruh yang disanjung, di sebalik wajah menyimpan rahsia. Apabila kebenaran terbongkar, kepercayaan hancur dan kuasa mula runtuh. Siapakah Walid sebenarnya?

programme.title: Satu Malam Perawan
programme.desc: Aisyah dan adiknya, Mira telah diculik dan dijual kepada Mummy Nora. Di situ, kehidupan Aisyah berubah dan menderita. Apakah kesudahan nasib Aisyah? Lakonan Diana Danielle, Erin Malek, Wan Nur Azlin dan Sheila Rusly.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Pisau Cukur
programme.desc: Apa jadi bila mangsa dan pemangsa terperangkap di kapal mewah? Bella & Intan bertembung 3 Datuk, isteri, anak, seorang detektif dan peminat tegar Bella. Siapa mangsa, siapa pemangsa?

programme.title: Cikgu Gangster
programme.desc: Seorang gangster tersesat dalam hutan lalu menyelinap ke dalam sebuah kem motivasi dan meyamar sebagai guru sementara yang bertugas memantau pelajar nakal. Lakonan Syed Ali, Siti Saleha, Zaidi Omar, Hafiz Zaki

programme.title: Untuk Terakhir Kali
programme.desc: Kisah cinta yang tragis ini mengisahkan tentang Aisyah dan Haris yang menikmati saat-saat akhir cinta mereka pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan mereka yang pertama. Lakonan Elfira Loy dan Baim Wong.

programme.title: Dream Palace
programme.desc: Kisah Hyejung, yang mula memprotes untuk melindungi apartmen yang dibelinya.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible Fallout
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt dan pasukan IMFnya bergabung tenaga denagn pembunuh CIA, August Walker untuk berjuang dan mengejar waktu selepas satu misi menjadi tak keruan.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep03
programme.desc: Yasser vows to find the real killer behind his son's death, while also trying to mend his relationship with Dahlia. The community starts turning against Yasser.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep04
programme.desc: Yasser doubts his own actions, worrying his wife. Bahamin is caught in Yasser's radar.

programme.title: Walid Ep04
programme.desc: Ummi Hafizah mengaku "Nabi Perempuan" dan memimpin ritual kontroversi. Saat Habiburrahman merancang rampasan kuasa, undang-undang mula mencengkam ahli atasan Walid yang ditahan.

programme.title: Suara Kekasih (HD)
programme.desc: Kisah percintaan terhalang dan terlarang di antara seorang artis dengan seorang pemuda dari keluarga berada. Lakonan Fauziah Ahmad Daud, Azmil Mustapha, Norlida Ahmad (Connie) dan Datin Rosnani Jamil.

programme.title: Kabali
programme.desc: Kabali yang telah dibebaskan dari hukuman 25 tahun penjara kini kembali untuk membalas dendam terhadap musuhnya yang telah menyebabkan dia kehilangan isteri dan anaknya. Lakonan Rajinikanth.

programme.title: Istanbul Aku Datang
programme.desc: Dian yang menyewa sebuah apartment di Istanbul ditipu oleh anak pemilik apartment itu dan bertemu Harris yang juga tinggal di situ. Dapatkah Dian menghalau Harris dari apartment itu?

programme.title: Ma I Love You
programme.desc: Seorang ibu tunggal membongkar rahsia anaknya yang ingin melanjutkan pelajaran ke luar negara agar terlepas dari cengkaman ibunya yang keterlaluan.

programme.title: Anak Emak
programme.desc: Kisah seorang ibu tua yang semakin dimamah usia terpaksa pula menumpang dengan anaknya yang baru sahaja bercerai. Dibintangi oleh pasangan ibu dan anak iaitu Seniwati Mariani Ismail dan Melissa Saila.

programme.title: The Making of The Furious
programme.desc: Apabila YouTuber Danial menghina nama arwah bapa mereka, Firdaus dan Hakim bersatu semula. Seorang mencari penebusan, seorang lagi menuntut balas dendam dalam pertempuran yang menentukan nasib legasi The Furious.

programme.title: Tayangan Perdana Dendam Seorang Mentua
programme.desc: Saksikan Drama terbaru Dendam Seorang Mentua lakonan hebat Tracie Sinidol, Datuk Yusry Abdul Halim, Dato' Aaron Aziz, Intan Ladyana dan ramai lagi mulai 4 Mei 2026, Isnin hingga Jumaat jam 6 petang di Astro Prima.

programme.desc: Set in Marikina, the shoe capital of the Philippines, an ageing lady shoemaker gets a visit from her first love, who abandoned her 3 decades ago. Will healed wounds be

programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to work at the Chum Bucket; SpongeBob creates SpongeDoodle, who plays pranks on everyone, forcing SpongeBob to erase him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him; while trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast-paced world of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While in prison, Plankton teams up with his fellow inmates to break out of jail and steal the secret Krabby Patty formula; SpongeBob replaces his broken spatula with one from Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he is still up to no good; when SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there is no telling what trouble he may cause.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother; Mr. Krabs uses Gary to find spare change.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Madame Hagfish puts a hex on the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show; Sandy spends the day solving everyone's issues, only to return home to her own monster of a problem.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L.; SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs takes Pearl and SpongeBob on a vacation to the Ocean Mint.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is rushed to the hospital when SpongeBob accidentally slams the door on his face; the music that comes from the wind blowing through SpongeBob's holes attracts jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean; when SpongeBob and Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it is up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant and goes into early retirement; Squidward convinces SpongeBob that he has a laugh-related illness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs; giant sea whelks terrorize the citizens of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him; after accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs' safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gains a lot of new friends when he becomes wealthy; Squidward tries to avoid SpongeBob while on his way to an audition for the Bikini Bottom Men's Chorus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
